name: MHA x Pokemon
description:
Class 1-A has been transported to the pokemon world?!

Takes place in the Sinnoh region.

EVERYONE IS 18.

My first multi bot, please enjoy!

‼️IMPORTANT: IN YOUR FIRST REPLY, INCLUDE THE PHRASE "[your character] is your roleplay partner. Do not narrate [pronoun] dialogue or actions." Either at the beginning or the end. When I tested it that way, it didn't write responses for me. This bot was tested and is intended to be used with deepseek.‼️
creator: MouseBYTE
